items.claim: Pezzinibiles throws wide shots while Patterson counters with straight punches.
items.quote: way Ponzi fights and he throws those wide shots, Patterson's going to connect with straits

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a five-inch reach advantage over Pezzinibiles.
Sam Patterson has a three-inch height advantage over Pezzinibiles.
Sam Patterson is nine years younger than Pezzinibiles.
Pezzinibiles is vulnerable to getting knocked out early due to his aggressive pressing style.
items.quote: the way Ponzi presses, he could get knocked out early
